visual_description: The audio is dominated by a deep, resonant, and ominous ambient drone. The sound is low and continuous, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere, as if building up to a significant and unsettling event. The video opens with a very dark, shaky, and blurry shot. The camera appears to be moving rapidly through a dimly lit, indistinct space. A faint, out-of-focus light source glows in the center of the frame, illuminating a blurry, textured surface to the left. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man standing in what appears to be a dimly lit indoor space, possibly a bar or a club. He is middle-aged with a shaved head and a short, graying beard. He wears a dark suit jacket over a dark shirt. His expression is serious and intense as he looks slightly off-camera. The background is out of focus, showing the blurred shapes of shelves and overhead lights. The same "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
